use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MODERATE TO SEVERE PRIMARY RESTLESS LEGS SYNDROME (RLS)

indications.text:
Parkinson's Disease
Mirapex® (pramipexole dihydrochloride) tablets are indicated for the treatment of the signs and
symptoms of idiopathic Parkinson's disease.
The effectiveness of MIRAPEX tablets was demonstrated in randomized, controlled trials in patients
with early Parkinson's disease who were n...

1.1 Parkinson's Disease
MIRAPEX tablets are indicated for the treatment of the signs and symptoms of idiopathic Parkinson's disease.
1.2 Restless Legs Syndrome
MIRAPEX tablets are indicated for the treatment of moderate-to-severe primary Restless Legs Syndrome (RLS).

(RLS).
